source_jobs.title: RevOps Manager
source_jobs.description:
Location: Remote (Canada)

Department: Revenue Operations

Reports to: GM - Revenue



About MoeGo 🐾

MoeGo is on a mission to transform the future of pet care business, from small-business groomers to franchise doggie hotels. The dedicated entrepreneurs behind these businesses keep our beloved pets happy and healthy—the majority of them are first-time business owners, and more than 80% are women. They deserve comprehensive technology solutions that keep their businesses operating smoothly end-to-end, so they can focus on healthy pets and happy pet parents.

Join us to help these “pet-repreneurs” build and grow thriving businesses—every conversation with a customer and every feature goes toward this larger purpose. From automated booking to payments and communication tools, MoeGo eliminates the administrative stress of running a pet care business. If you’re looking for a career that combines innovation with heart, MoeGo is the place where technology meets tail wags. Join us in shaping the future of pet care, one happy groomer, one joyful pet, and one loving owner at a time.

About the Role

At MoeGo, we are moving beyond simple tool management. We are looking for a Revenue Operations Manager to serve as the architect of our growth engine. You will be designing the data flow and tech stack that supports our journey from a market leader to a global powerhouse in the pet industry.



You will bridge the gap between raw data and executive strategy, ensuring our Sales, Marketing, and Success teams have the systems they need to scale without friction.




Key Responsibilities:

 1. Systems Architecture & Innovation
    
    1. The Salesforce Vision: Act as the primary owner of Salesforce, moving us away from "out of the box" setups toward a bespoke architecture that supports complex multi-product motions.
    
    2. Tech Stack Evolution: Evaluate, implement, and integrate the next generation of our stack (e.g., Gong, Clari, LeanData, or specialized Billing/FinTech tools).
    
    3. Automation: Build advanced flows and triggers that eliminate "manual grunt work" for our Account Executives and Success Managers.

 2. Data Integrity & Strategic Insight
    
    1. The "Single Source of Truth": Define and maintain our core revenue metrics (CAC, LTV, GRR/NRR, and Pipeline Velocity).
    
    2. Predictive Analytics: Don't just report on what happened; build the models that tell us what will happen. You will provide the CRO and CEO with the insights needed to pivot or double down on specific segments.
    
    3. Lifecycle Mapping: Optimize the handoff points between Marketing, Sales, and Success to ensure no lead or customer falls through the cracks.

 3. Strategic Partnership
    
    1. Forecasting: Lead the weekly and monthly revenue forecasting process, ensuring high accuracy and accountability across the leadership team.
    
    2. Incentive Design: Help design and track commission structures that align with our long-term growth goals.
    
    3. Enablement Liaison: Partner with Enablement to ensure that every system change you make is backed by a training plan so the team actually uses what you build.



Who You Are:

 - The Architect: You have 3–5 years of RevOps experience

 - The Strategist: You don’t just build dashboards; you can explain the story the data is telling and recommend a course of action.

 - The Data Tinkerer: You are proficient in SQL, Excel/Google Sheets, and data visualization tools (Tableau, Looker, or Sigma).

 - The Problem Solver: You have a "systems thinking" mindset. You understand that changing a field in Marketing affects a report in Finance.



Why MoeGo?

 - Impact: You aren't joining a company to maintain a legacy system; you are joining to build the future of one.

 - Scale: We are growing fast. The systems you build today will support hundreds of employees and thousands of customers tomorrow.

 - Culture: We are obsessed with the pet industry and the merchants we serve. If you love building too

source_jobs.title: Head of Partnerships and Customer Marketing
source_jobs.description:
Location: Remote (Canada)

Department: Partnerships

Reports to: GM Enterprise & Revenue Lead

Imagine being part of a team that helps professionals spend less time buried in paperwork and more time with wagging tails, happy barks, and purring cats. Every conversation with a customer, and every feature we build goes toward a bigger purpose, ensuring pets receive the love and care they deserve. From automated booking to communication tools, MoeGo eliminates administrative stress, making every interaction smooth for both the caregiver and the pet parent.

If you’re looking for a career that combines innovation with heart, MoeGo is the place where technology meets tail wags. Join us in shaping the future of pet care, one happy groomer, one joyful pet, and one loving owner at a time.

We believe that pets are family, and when our customers can focus on giving pets their full attention, we create ripples of joy that touch every household they serve. By joining MoeGo, you’ll become part of a community driven by compassion, purpose, and impact. Whether you’re a tech enthusiast, a customer service professional, or a creative marketer, your skills will play a vital role in improving the lives of pets, and in turn, their humans.



Position Overview:
As the Head of Partnerships, you will be responsible for developing and executing a robust channel partnership strategy that secures exclusive alliances with key industry channels. You will lead efforts to own and dominate the channel, ensuring our solutions become the preferred choice in the pet care industry. Existing relationships in the pet industry and deep knowledge of vertical SaaS partnerships will be critical to your success.

Key Responsibilities:

 - Strategic Partnership Development:
   
   - Formulate and implement a comprehensive channel partnership strategy aligned with our business goals.

 - Identify, evaluate, and secure exclusive partnerships with the most important channels in the pet care industry.

 - Channel Leadership:
   
   - Own the end-to-end channel ecosystem to establish our dominance in the market.
   
   - Collaborate with sales, marketing, product, and customer success teams to ensure seamless execution of partnership initiatives.

 - Relationship Management:
   
   - Leverage existing relationships and build new connections within the pet care industry to drive strategic value.
   
   - Negotiate and structure partnership agreements that deliver mutual growth and revenue.

 - Creative Partnership Solutions:
   
   - Develop innovative and customized partnership solutions to overcome challenges and achieve business objectives.
   
   - Utilize industry insights to refine and optimize our partnership models continuously.

 - Market Analysis & Performance:
   
   - Monitor industry trends, competitive activities, and market dynamics to inform strategic adjustments.
   
   - Establish and track key performance indicators (KPIs) to evaluate the success of partnership initiatives.

Qualifications:

 - Extensive experience in developing and managing channel partnerships, ideally within the SaaS or pet care vertical.

 - Demonstrated ability to strategize, build, and nurture exclusive, high-impact channel partnerships.

 - Strong existing relationships within the pet care industry are highly desirable.

 - In-depth understanding of vertical SaaS partnerships and market dynamics.

 - Proven negotiation skills with a creative approach to crafting partnership solutions that align with business objectives.

 - Exceptional communication, leadership, and analytical skills, with a track record of delivering measurable growth.

 - Ability to thrive in a fast-paced, innovative environment and drive cross-functional collaboration.

MoeGo offers a competitive compensation package (base salary, performance bonus, and benefits). This includes flexible benefit plans for employees and their family members at no cost to employees, as well as 401(k) matching.

MoeGo is committed to

source_jobs.title: Support Specialist 1
source_jobs.description:
Location: Remote (Canada)

Department: Customer Support

Reports to: Head of Support

 

About MoeGo 🐾

MoeGo is on a mission to transform the future of pet care business, from small-business groomers to franchise doggie hotels. The dedicated entrepreneurs behind these businesses keep our beloved pets happy and healthy—the majority of them are first-time business owners, and more than 80% are women. They deserve comprehensive technology solutions that keep their businesses operating smoothly end-to-end, so they can focus on healthy pets and happy pet parents.

Join us to help these “pet-repreneurs” build and grow thriving businesses—every conversation with a customer and every feature goes toward this larger purpose. From automated booking to payments and communication tools, MoeGo eliminates the administrative stress of running a pet care business. If you’re looking for a career that combines innovation with heart, MoeGo is the place where technology meets tail wags. Join us in shaping the future of pet care, one happy groomer, one joyful pet, and one loving owner at a time.

About the Role

As a Support Specialist I, you’ll be a key member of MoeGo’s Customer Support team, helping customers successfully use our platform by delivering timely, empathetic, and effective support. You’ll manage customer inquiries independently, troubleshoot moderately complex product issues, and ensure each interaction leaves customers feeling confident and supported.

This role is ideal for someone with SaaS support experience who enjoys problem-solving, managing a high volume of requests, and continuously improving the customer experience.

 

Key Responsibilities:

 - Manage customer support requests end-to-end across channels such as ticketing systems, live chat, and phone (as applicable)

 - Troubleshoot and resolve common to moderately complex product issues independently

 - Provide clear, friendly, and professional communication tailored to each customer’s needs

 - Meet or exceed support performance metrics including response time, resolution time, and customer satisfaction (CSAT)

 - Prioritize and manage a high volume of tickets while maintaining accuracy and quality

 - Document resolutions thoroughly, ensuring proper categorization and clear notes

 - Identify recurring customer issues and suggest improvements to workflows, tooling, or documentation

 - Create or update knowledge base articles to improve self-service and team efficiency

 - Collaborate with Engineering, Product, and Customer Success teams when escalation or coordination is needed

 - Support newer team members by sharing knowledge and best practices as you grow in the role

 

Minimum Qualifications:

 - 1–3+ years of experience in a customer support role, ideally in a SaaS or technology environment

 - Experience supporting customers via a ticketing system and/or live chat

 - Typing speed of 80 words per minute (WPM) or higher

 - Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving skills

 - Excellent written and verbal communication skills

 - Ability to explain technical concepts clearly to non-technical users

 - Comfort managing multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment

 - Customer-first mindset with strong ownership and accountability

Preferred Qualifications:

 - Experience supporting B2B SaaS products

 - Familiarity with support metrics such as CSAT, response time, and resolution time

 - Experience contributing to documentation or process improvements

 - Exposure to SMB, multi-location, or enterprise customers

 - Experience working cross-functionally with Product, Engineering, or Customer Success teams

MoeGo offers a competitive compensation package (base salary, performance bonus, and benefits). This includes flexible benefit plans for employees and their family members at no cost to employees, as well as 401(k) matching.

MoeGo is committed to creating a diverse and inclusive work environment, and is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applic

source_jobs.title: Junior Onboarding Specialist
source_jobs.description:
Location: Remote (US or Canada)

Department: Onboarding

Reports to: Director of Sales



About MoeGo 🐾

MoeGo is on a mission to transform the future of pet care business, from small-business groomers to franchise doggie hotels. The dedicated entrepreneurs behind these businesses keep our beloved pets happy and healthy—the majority of them are first-time business owners, and more than 80% are women. They deserve comprehensive technology solutions that keep their businesses operating smoothly end-to-end, so they can focus on healthy pets and happy pet parents.

Join us to help these “pet-repreneurs” build and grow thriving businesses—every conversation with a customer and every feature goes toward this larger purpose. From automated booking to payments and communication tools, MoeGo eliminates the administrative stress of running a pet care business. If you’re looking for a career that combines innovation with heart, MoeGo is the place where technology meets tail wags. Join us in shaping the future of pet care, one happy groomer, one joyful pet, and one loving owner at a time.

About the Role

We are looking for a Junior Onboarding Specialist to join our Customer Success team and support the seamless onboarding of our T4 and T5 tier clients (vSMB & SMB). In this role, you will be the first point of contact for new customers, guiding them through product setup, training, and early adoption to set them up for long-term success.



This is a high-impact, customer-facing role that requires strong communication skills, a passion for helping others, and the ability to manage multiple accounts simultaneously in a fast-paced environment.




Key Responsibilities:

 - Guide new T4 and T5 tier customers through the full MoeGo onboarding process from kickoff to go-live

 - Conduct product walkthroughs, training sessions, and Q&A calls to drive early product adoption

 - Manage a portfolio of onboarding accounts simultaneously, ensuring timely milestones and customer satisfaction

 - Partner with Account Executives to ensure a smooth handoff from sales to onboarding

 - Document customer configurations, progress, and outcomes in CRM and project management tools

 - Identify and escalate risks or blockers that may impact the customer experience

 - Contribute to the continuous improvement of onboarding playbooks, resources, and processes

 - Collaborate cross-functionally with Support, Product, and Sales teams to resolve customer issues




Minimum Qualifications:

 - 1–2 years of experience in a customer-facing role (onboarding, customer success, support, or similar)

 - Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English

 - Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple accounts and priorities

 - Comfort with technology platforms and ability to learn new software quickly

 - A customer-first mindset with genuine enthusiasm for helping people succeed

 - Ability to work independently and proactively in a remote environment



Preferred Qualifications:

 - Experience working with SaaS platforms or in a tech startup environment

 - Familiarity with CRM tools such as Salesforce, HubSpot or Monday.com http://Monday.com

 - Background in the pet care, grooming, or service industry

 - Experience working cross-functionally with sales or product teams

 
 

Why MoeGo:

 - Competitive compensation at $75,000 CAD with opportunity for growth

 - Fully remote role with flexible working hours

 - Be part of a mission-driven team that genuinely loves what they do

 - High-growth environment with real opportunities to advance your career

 - Collaborative, inclusive team culture that values your ideas and input

MoeGo offers a competitive compensation package (base salary, performance bonus, and benefits). This includes flexible benefit plans for employees and their family members at no cost to employees, as well as 401(k) matching.

MoeGo is committed to creating a diverse and inclusive work environment, and is an equal op

source_jobs.title: Senior Product Manager, FinTech
source_jobs.description:
Location: Remote (US or Canada)

Department: Product

Reports to: Senior Product Manager, Fintech



About MoeGo 🐾

MoeGo is on a mission to transform the future of pet care business, from small-business groomers to franchise doggie hotels. The dedicated entrepreneurs behind these businesses keep our beloved pets happy and healthy—the majority of them are first-time business owners, and more than 80% are women. They deserve comprehensive technology solutions that keep their businesses operating smoothly end-to-end, so they can focus on healthy pets and happy pet parents.

Join us to help these “pet-repreneurs” build and grow thriving businesses—every conversation with a customer and every feature goes toward this larger purpose. From automated booking to payments and communication tools, MoeGo eliminates the administrative stress of running a pet care business. If you’re looking for a career that combines innovation with heart, MoeGo is the place where technology meets tail wags. Join us in shaping the future of pet care, one happy groomer, one joyful pet, and one loving owner at a time.

 

About the Role

We're hiring a [Senior / Staff] Product Manager to lead our fintech product line: MoeGo Pay, invoicing, embedded accounting, and the financial products on our roadmap (think invoice factoring, embedded payroll, and beyond).

This is a two-part mandate. In the near term, you'll bring order to complex, business-critical financial workflows — sharpening the experiences our customers depend on every day. In the longer term, you'll build toward a more sophisticated suite of financial products that deepen how MoeGo serves its customers. You'll need the craft to stabilize and polish what exists, and the ambition and credibility to build what's next.

You'll work shoulder-to-shoulder with engineering, design, and go-to-market, and you'll partner with third-party financial infrastructure providers as our roadmap expands. This role is suited to someone operating at the senior-to-staff level — leading a product area end to end, setting strategy, and raising the bar for the teams around you.



What You’ll Do:

 - Own the strategy, roadmap, and execution for MoeGo's payments, invoicing, and accounting products.

 - Sit inside complex financial workflows and create clarity — distinguishing critical, UX-breaking issues from nice-to-haves, and building a remediation roadmap engineering and stakeholders can trust.

 - Obsess over the full user journey of money movement: what happens when a payment fails halfway through, when a charge is disputed, when a payment is partial, when reconciliation doesn't line up.

 - Define the metrics that matter — payment success rates, dispute rates, deposit conversion — and work with analytics to surface them.

 - Collaborate across engineering, design, and GTM to ship reliable, polished financial experiences, and influence partners and third parties as we build embedded products.

 - Make and communicate clear tradeoffs, keeping the trust of both your team and leadership as you balance cleanup against new capability.
   

What We’re Looking For:

 - Fintech product experience. Hands-on PM experience with invoicing, payments, billing, or financial workflows — ideally B2B or SMB-facing. You intuitively understand reconciliation, payment states, disputes, and partial payments; we won't need to teach you the fundamentals.

 - Comfort in messy systems. You can sit in a complex, imperfect system and bring order to it, partnering closely with engineering to prioritize technical debt and triage bugs. Startup experience is a strong plus.

 - Strong product sense for financial flows. You've shipped polished, reliable financial experiences and you think critically through edge cases and failure states. These are our most-used, most critical workflows — they have to be right.

 - Cross-functional fluency. You collaborate effectively across EPD and GTM, and you can influence and partner with third parties.

 - Data fl

source_jobs.title: Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
Location: Remote (Canada)

Department: Sales

Reports to: Director of Sales



About MoeGo 🐾

MoeGo is on a mission to transform the future of pet care business, from small-business groomers to franchise doggie hotels. The dedicated entrepreneurs behind these businesses keep our beloved pets happy and healthy—the majority of them are first-time business owners, and more than 80% are women. They deserve comprehensive technology solutions that keep their businesses operating smoothly end-to-end, so they can focus on healthy pets and happy pet parents.

Join us to help these “pet-repreneurs” build and grow thriving businesses—every conversation with a customer and every feature goes toward this larger purpose. From automated booking to payments and communication tools, MoeGo eliminates the administrative stress of running a pet care business. If you’re looking for a career that combines innovation with heart, MoeGo is the place where technology meets tail wags. Join us in shaping the future of pet care, one happy groomer, one joyful pet, and one loving owner at a time.



About the Role

We are hiring our First Inside Account Executive focused exclusively on outbound sales.



This is not an inbound closer role. You will be responsible for creating your own pipeline, owning the full sales cycle, and winning business with large single-location operators and multi-unit groups (MUOs).



You’ll play a foundational role in:

 - Building our outbound motion

 - Defining messaging and playbooks

 - Establishing repeatable success in the mid-market / MUO segment



This is a high-impact, high-autonomy role for someone who thrives in early-stage environments and wants to help build something from the ground up.




What You’ll Do

 1. Own Outbound Pipeline Generation
    
    1. Prospect into high-value pet care businesses (single + multi-unit)
    
    2. Execute multi-channel outreach (calls, email, video, social)
    
    3. Build and manage a consistent, high-quality pipeline
    
    4. Identify and break into complex accounts with multiple stakeholders

 2. Run Full Sales Cycle
    
    1. Lead discovery rooted in business outcomes (revenue, labor, utilization)
    
    2. Deliver tailored product demos aligned to operational pain
    
    3. Build ROI-driven proposals and close deals
    
    4. Manage deals from first touch → signed contract

 3. Sell to Complexity
    
    1. Navigate multi-stakeholder environments (owners, operators, managers)
    
    2. Sell into both single-location operators and growing chains
    
    3. Position value across:
       
       1. Revenue growth (online booking, upsells)
       
       2. Operational efficiency (staffing, scheduling)
       
       3. Cost reduction (manual work, missed bookings)

 4. Build the Outbound Playbook
    
    1. Test messaging, sequences, and targeting strategies
    
    2. Provide feedback loops to marketing and leadership
    
    3. Help define what “great outbound” looks like at scale



Who You Are

 - Core Traits:
   
   - Hunter Mentality: You generate pipeline, not wait for it
   
   - Process-Oriented: You bring structure to outbound and deal execution
   
   - Commercially Sharp: You understand how businesses make money
   
   - Resilient: You thrive in high-rejection, high-reward environments
   
   - Builder: You want to create, not just execute



Required Experience:

 - 3–5+ years in SaaS sales (closing role required)

 - Proven success in outbound / self-sourced pipeline

 - Experience running full sales cycle (discovery → close)

 - Track record of hitting or exceeding quota

 - Comfortable selling into SMB + mid-market accounts



Preferred Experience:

 - Experience selling to multi-unit operators (MUOs)

 - Vertical SaaS (restaurants, fitness, pet care, etc.)

 - Early-stage / startup environment (Series A–C)

 - Familiarity with operational workflows (scheduling, staffing, payments)



Why This Role Matters:

 - This is a foundational hire.

notes: MoeGo is a pet care business technology solutions company with a mix of tech and non-tech roles.
